step_rationale: Inositol transporter; heart-failure marker not directly related to atherothrombotic Type 1 MI cascade.
mechanism: SLC5A3 (SMIT1) expression reflects myocardial metabolic dysregulation in heart-failure pathophysiology.

references.title: Plasma myo-inositol elevation in heart failure: clinical implications and prognostic significance. Results from the BElgian and CAnadian MEtabolomics in HFpEF (BECAME-HF) research project.
